news.headline: Join us for the release of Vallourec's Q2 & H1 2024 results and conference call. Do not miss out!
Investing $1,000 in US equities in 2023 would have yielded $1,145 by mid-2024 with a 14.5% gain. To know more, visit Benzinga.com.
news.summary: The equity market had a strong performance in 2023 and continued this momentum in 2024 due to hopes of global central banks reversing rate hikes and strong economic performance. US equities saw a 14.5% gain in the first half of the year, with a 10% increase in the first quarter and 3.9% in the second quarter. However, inflation started to rise again in the second quarter, potentially impacting the market's upward trend. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Billionaire Peter Thiel doubts Bitcoin’s future growth, regrets not investing more; skeptical about significant price increase.
news.summary: Billionaire Peter Thiel, known for co-founding PayPal, shared doubts about Bitcoin's future price growth in a recent CNBC interview. Thiel, also a founder of Founders Fund, expressed uncertainty about the cryptocurrency's potential for significant price surge, questioning who else would invest in it after the introduction of the ETF edition. Despite holding some Bitcoin, Thiel admitted regret for not acquiring more. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: SingularityNET (AGIX) reveals key ecosystem advancements in June 2024 - ASI Alliance token merger, Deep Funding Round 4 results, AGI-24 Conference info, etc.
news.summary: SingularityNET has made significant announcements, unveiling updates such as the ASI Alliance token merger and the results of Deep Funding Round 4. Additionally, they have shared specifics regarding the upcoming AGI-24 Conference. Stay informed by reading more about these developments.

news.headline: sCrypt launches developer platform for UTXO blockchains in San Francisco on July 1, 2024, to revolutionize developer interaction.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in San Francisco, sCrypt unveiled a revolutionary developer tool kit tailored for Unspent Transaction Output (UTXO) blockchains. This full-stack Web3/blockchain development platform aims to transform how developers engage with this technology. The launch signifies a significant development in the blockchain sector and marks a milestone for sCrypt in providing cutting-edge tools to users.

news.headline: Investors in Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by August 12, 2024 regarding class action securities lawsuit - NY, July 1, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, a press release revealed that Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has informed investors holding shares in the company Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) about a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit aims to retrieve losses incurred by investors who were involved with Lamb Weston.

news.headline: Chinese Vice Premier announces equal treatment for domestic and foreign companies in equipment upgrades and government acquisitions.
EHang and China Southern Airlines General Aviation partner for pilotless eVTOL operations, focusing on low-altitude economy.
news.summary: On July 01, 2024, in Guangzhou, China, EHang Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: EH), a prominent urban air mobility technology firm, disclosed a significant development. They have entered a strategic Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with China Southern Airlines General Aviation Company Limited (CSGAC), a key player in general aviation services and a strategic business unit of China Southern Airlines Company Limited. This collaboration will focus on various aspects of EHang's pilotless electric vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) technology, including flight operations and comprehensive support. The aim is to collectively innovate solutions for the low-altitude economy sector.

news.headline: Chinese Vice Premier announces increased market access & removal of foreign investment restrictions - State media.
Zeta Global debuts Zeta Economic Index (ZEI), AI-powered US economy barometer. Proprietary data analyzes trends.
news.summary: Zeta Global, a prominent AI-Powered Marketing Cloud company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ZETA, introduced the Zeta Economic Index (ZEI) in New York today. This index, powered by Zeta's advanced Generative AI technology and exclusive data, functions as a cutting-edge gauge for the condition of the US economy. By studying consumer behavior and evaluating economic conditions, the ZEI can forecast economic trends accurately. Zeta, renowned for its Data Cloud offering AI-driven insights to top global enterprises since 2018, aims to revolutionize economic analysis with the ZEI.

news.headline: New USDC-margined CRV perpetual contract with 25x leverage now available on Binance Futures, offering more trading options.
news.summary: Binance Futures has introduced new USDC-margined CRV perpetual contracts that offer traders leverage of up to 25x, providing a boost to trading options and experiences. This latest offering aims to appeal to investors looking to capitalize on the CRV market, where users can amplify their positions up to twenty-five times using USDC collateral. The introduction of these contracts signifies Binance's commitment to expanding its product range and catering to the needs of diverse traders.

news.headline: Didier Drogba wins Fair Play Menarini International Award at 28th edition in Italy, esteemed global football legend.
news.summary: In Florence, Italy, on July 1, 2024, the Fair Play Menarini International Award continues to impress with its surprises. The Award Jury has announced the addition of football legend Didier Drogba to the list of winners for the 2024 edition. Drogba is a two-time African award winner and a renowned champion in the sport.

news.headline: Hookah tobacco market to grow by $705.2 million from 2024-2028, with CAGR of 4.57%, despite regulatory challenges.
news.summary: As of July 1, 2024, the global hookah tobacco market is projected to increase by approximately USD 705.2 million between 2024 and 2028, with a forecasted compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of nearly 4.57%. These statistics come from Technavio's latest report, offering detailed insights into market trends and forecasts for the period.

news.headline: Cardano co-founder raises concerns over AI censorship and selective training by big tech companies.
news.summary: Charles Hoskinson, a co-founder of the cryptocurrency Cardano, has expressed worries about AI censorship and the biased training of AI systems by major tech companies. He emphasizes the need to address these issues as these companies hold significant control over the development of AI technologies.

news.headline: Crypto companies in Hawaii are no longer required to have a Money Transmitter License, but must follow federal regulations.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency companies in Hawaii are not required to obtain a Money Transmitter License; however, they must ensure compliance with all relevant federal licensing regulations.

news.headline: Sony subsidiary renamed S.BLOX, boosts crypto trading. Enhances WhaleFin with Sony's crypto goals.
news.summary: S.BLOX plans to improve WhaleFin's user interface and functionality to align with Sony Group's expanding interest in cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Crypto hacks decreased by over half in June, losing $176M. May 2024 saw the highest losses with almost $385M lost.
news.summary: During the month of May in 2024, the cryptocurrency market experienced significant losses, with total net losses from crypto hacks amounting to approximately $385 million. May stood out as the most substantial period in terms of crypto losses for the year.

news.headline: NFC Forum introduces multi-purpose tap for seamless user experience in transactions by allowing a single tap for payments, discounts, receipts, and loyalty points.
news.summary: In London, a new NFC multi-purpose tap is transforming transactions by allowing users to complete payments, redeem discounts, receive receipts, and earn loyalty points all with a single tap. This innovation is set to streamline the process and enhance customer convenience significantly.

news.headline: NIO Inc. updates on June and Q2 2024 delivery numbers.
Increase in men seeking gynecomastia surgery at Gynecomastia Surgery Group of Long Island, under Dr. Arnold S. Breitbart.
news.summary: Today, Dr. Arnold S. Breitbart, the creator of Gynecomastia Surgery Group of Long Island located in Hauppauge, NY, shared that his practice specializing in gynecomastia surgery has observed a significant and consistent increase in male patients. This surge in interest has been prominent and ongoing. The announcement was made in Hauppauge, NY on July 1, 2024.

news.headline: Improved EzCheckPrinting software helps Quickbooks clients print unlimited checks on blank stock at halfpricesoft.com.
news.summary: The EzCheckPrinting software, along with its unique virtual printer, provides QuickBooks users with a cost-effective option to print endless checks on blank stock without any additional fees. To experience this user-friendly check software, visit halfpricesoft.com. This solution is based out of Allentown, Pennsylvania, and was introduced on July 1, 2024.

news.headline: Planet Classroom Network debuts "Net Zero Speaks" with Marinel Ubaldo, discussing climate action strategies. Presented by Protect Our Planet Movement.
news.summary: Join an inspiring discussion on climate action with renowned climate justice advocate Marinel Ubaldo in New York on July 1, 2024. The event is organized by the Planet Classroom Network and the Protect Our Planet Movement, aiming to explore effective strategies for a sustainable future. Don't miss out on this opportunity to engage with a leading figure in environmental activism.

news.headline: HB Media Solutions offers a 50% off "Christmas in July" special for VHS to digital transfer services.
news.summary: A leading media-to-digital transfer service, HB Media Solutions, has revealed its special promotion "Christmas in July." Customers can now avail a significant discount of 50% on premium transfer services, such as converting VHS to Digital, VHS-C to Digital, Hi-8, and Mini DV Tapes to Digital. This limited-time offer provides an opportunity to digitize cherished memories at half the usual cost.

news.headline: Former stage-2 hypertension patient Scott Fleming launches Core3Vitality, introducing Nitric Oxide 400 to support cardiovascular health.
news.summary: Entrepreneur Scott Fleming, who previously battled stage-2 hypertension, has launched Nitric Oxide 400 through his company Core3Vitality. This supplement is designed to promote cardiovascular well-being in a natural way. The product was officially introduced in Las Vegas on July 1, 2024.

news.headline: NYECC marks 20th anniversary, combining 100+ years of OCER and NYEBF. Leading energy customer advocacy in NY.
news.summary: NYECC, a prominent energy consumer advocacy group in New York State, marked its 20th Anniversary today. This organization represents a significant number of energy users in the state. Founded over 70 years ago, it has become a key player in advocating for energy consumers' rights.

news.headline: ArcelorMittal S.A. has published its 2023 Payments to Governments report for Extractive Industries.
Investors flock to South African stocks as new coalition government forms, boosting market opportunities.
Pope Francis met with ALLATRA President to discuss climate change, as part of a gathering of experts at the Vatican.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Pope Francis held a private audience at the Apostolic Palace in Vatican City where he met with the President of ALLATRA and other notable scientists and experts. The meeting involved individuals from diverse countries and fields of expertise. The audience took place at the Vatican and was an opportunity for the Pope to engage with these distinguished guests.

news.headline: Sandvik acquires majority stake in Suzhou Ahno from Ningbo Baosi Energy Equipment Co. Ltd. in China.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Sandvik finalized the acquisition of a majority share in Suzhou Ahno Precision Cutting Tool Technology Co., Ltd. from the majority stakeholder Ningbo Baosi Energy Equipment Co., Ltd. This strategic move positions Sandvik to further establish its presence in China's market. The specific financial details of the deal, including the percentage of the stake acquired and the monetary value of the transaction, have not been disclosed to the public.

news.headline: BlackRock to purchase U.K.-based Preqin for $3.2 billion.
Alvotech reports record preliminary results for Q2 2024: Revenues and EBITDA reach new heights. $ALVO's global impact grows.
news.summary: Alvotech, a biotech company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol ALVO, focusing on producing biosimilar medications for global patients, has revealed initial unaudited financial data for the second quarter and first half of the year ending June 30, 2024.

news.headline: Streaming giants Netflix and Amazon experience a surge in TV show market, with increased viewership and revenue.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is predicted to grow at a rate of 3.5% in the upcoming year, with the United States leading the way with an expected growth of 4.2%. The Chinese economy is also set to see a significant increase with a projected growth rate of 6.5%. The Eurozone, however, is expected to experience slower growth at 2.1%. This positive trend in the global economy is attributed to various factors such as increased consumer spending, improved business investments, and stable global trade relations. Experts believe that this growth will contribute to job creation and overall economic stability in the coming year.

news.headline: Vantage Markets starts "Trading Championship 2024" with $100,000 top prize for top trader. Open to traders from selected countries.
news.summary: In Port Vila, Vanuatu, on July 1, 2024, a renowned multi-asset broker, Vantage Markets, announced the commencement of the Trading Championship 2024. This competition welcomes traders from specific countries to exhibit their expertise and compete for prizes.

news.headline: PandaFantasy: First sports fantasy stock market allows fans to profit from their sports expertise. Join now!
news.summary: The latest data indicates that there has been an increase of 2,500 new COVID-19 cases reported in the past 24 hours, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to 150,000. Additionally, there have been 50 new fatalities recorded, raising the death toll to 3,000. Health officials have emphasized the importance of following safety guidelines, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to help curb the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter measures in the coming days to address the rising numbers of infections and deaths. Increased testing and vaccination efforts are also being planned to combat the ongoing pandemic.

news.headline: Model, actress, businesswoman Brooke Shields now leads Actors’ Equity as president. Reveals insights on her new role.
news.summary: The recently appointed president of Actors' Equity, who transitioned from modeling to acting and now as a businesswoman, shared insights on her new role in a recent interview. Outlining her objectives and strategies for the organization, she expressed enthusiasm for leading with a fresh perspective. This development marks a significant milestone in her career, with her assuming responsibility for guiding the renowned actors' union.

news.headline: Liberty Safe teams up with Folds of Honor & Tractor Supply to launch exclusive safe honoring heroes.
news.summary: In Payson, Utah on July 1, 2024, Liberty Safe revealed a new collaboration with Folds of Honor and Tractor Supply Company. This partnership introduces a special safe paying tribute to the service of fallen and disabled military personnel, as well as first responders. This exclusive safe aims to commemorate their sacrifices and will be available for purchase at select Tractor Supply Company locations.

news.headline: KCOFFEE opens 200th store in China with Yum China Holdings, celebrating growth and expansion.
news.summary: Yum China Holdings, Inc. has recently reached a significant milestone by opening the 200th store of its KCOFFEE brand in China. The company, listed on NYSE as YUMC and on HKEX as 9987, made this announcement on July 1, 2024, expressing satisfaction with the expansion. This achievement follows the inauguration of two additional stores in Hangzhou East Railway Station and Hangzhou just the day before. The growth of KCOFFEE demonstrates Yum China's successful penetration into the Chinese market and its commitment to further expanding its presence in the region.

news.headline: GEP acquires OpusCapita, a leading Europe-based procurement and e-invoicing software provider, increasing strength in Northern Europe.
news.summary: GEP has strengthened its position in the Nordic countries and northern Europe by merging with the top AI-driven procurement and supply chain software provider and the leading e-invoicing & accounts payable automation solutions company. This collaboration enhances GEP's already strong presence in the U.K., central Europe, and surrounding regions. This union consolidates GEP's leadership in the industry by combining cutting-edge technologies.

news.headline: Protein alternatives market to reach $25.2 billion by 2029, with a projected CAGR of 9.9% from 2024.
news.summary: As of July 1, 2024, the market for protein alternatives is valued at approximately $15.7 billion and is anticipated to grow to $25.2 billion by 2029, reflecting a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.9% during the period from 2024 to 2029. This data comes from a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™. The sector for alternative proteins...

news.headline: Gen Z in Latin America prefer peanuts, almonds, and walnuts for snacking; 96% snack between meals. Taste and health drive consumption. INC's NutTunes campaign to promote snack choices.
news.summary: The top choices for snacking among Gen Z in Latin America are peanuts, almonds, and walnuts. A staggering 96% of individuals in this demographic snack between meals, with yogurt, dairy products, and fresh fruits being commonly selected options. The primary motivations behind the consumption of nuts and dried fruits are their appealing taste and health benefits. The NutTunes campaign by INC aims to further promote the consumption of these nutritious snacks among the youth demographic in the region.

news.headline: XPENG delivered 10,668 vehicles in June 2024, a 24% rise from previous year's figures.
news.summary: In June 2024, there were 10,668 vehicles delivered, marking a significant year-over-year increase of 24%.

news.headline: Latvijas Gāze announced a buyback offer from the Bank of Latvia for shares excluded from the market. #JSCLatvijasGāze #BankofLatvia #sharebuyback
Betsson Sport partners with Inter, logo on jerseys; features 2 stars for 20th Scudetto win.
news.summary: In July 1, 2024, in TA' XBIEX, Malta, popular betting company Betsson announced a new partnership with Inter, unveiling the Betsson Sport infotainment logo to be featured on Inter's jerseys. The collaboration comes in celebration of Betsson's 60th anniversary and Inter's recent 20th Scudetto victory, which will be symbolized by the addition of two stars on the team's jerseys - a first in their history. This strategic alliance signals a significant shift in the branding strategy for both parties involved and is poised to garner attention globally.

news.headline: Macron's risky move could result in a France that is difficult to govern.
Sydbank repurchases shares, transactions in week 26.
The theory behind the widespread frenzy explained in a recent report by Bloomberg.
Binance improves Auto-Invest entry points on website and app for better user experience. Read more for updates.
news.summary: Binance has recently improved its Auto-Invest feature by simplifying access points on its website and app, aiming to enhance user experience with the platform. This update has made it easier for users to utilize the Auto-Invest feature, potentially making it more convenient for a higher number of users to take advantage of this service.

news.headline: BearingPoint names 19 new Partners, aims for global growth. Record revenue at €1.017 billion in 2023.
news.summary: Amsterdam-based management and technology consultancy firm, BearingPoint, has recently promoted 19 new Partners internally, with the effective date set for July 1. Demonstrating a commitment to prioritizing people development, these appointments are in line with the company's growth strategy to expand its expertise and services on a global scale. In 2023, BearingPoint reported record-breaking revenue figures, totaling €1.017 billion, marking an impressive 18% surge compared to the previous year. Kiumars Hamidian, Managing Partner at BearingPoint, expressed enthusiasm about these developments as the firm continues to advance its position in the industry.

news.headline: Transfer of Registered Office from XXX to Malta finalised by Multitude SE, with 100 employees impacted.
Scandinavian Tobacco Group A/S finalizes acquisition of Mac Baren Tobacco Company A/S.
